case_title: RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK VS. SANDRA LI et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LI, SANDRA AN IND DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-16-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-31-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-23-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-23-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-18-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-16-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-18-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
